description: Plugin-distributed hooks for realtime-collaboration-engineering. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 3 collaborative-systems design smells on .md/.txt (CRDT/OT design with no consistency guarantee named, presence/cursor feature with no ephemeral/separate-channel handling, library/protocol reference with no date/verify-at-use). Set RTC_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
